title: Wind Rising In The Alleys
content:
Wind rising in the alleys
    My spirit lifts in you like a banner streaming free of hot walls.
    You are full of unspent dreams....
    You are laden with beginnings....
    There is hope in you... not sweet... acrid as blood in the mouth.
    Come into my tossing dust
    Scattering the peace of old deaths,
    Wind rising in the alleys,
    Carrying stuff of flame.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Lola Ridge, titled "Wind Rising In The Alleys", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
